# Retrospective Action Items: [Project Name] — [Sprint / Release / Date]

> **Usage:** Use this template to capture agreed improvement actions at the end of each retrospective. Convert all action items to tracked issues or backlog tickets within 48 hours of the retrospective.

---

## Retrospective Details

| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| **Project / Team** | [Name] |
| **Retrospective Date** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Facilitator** | [Project Manager Name] |
| **Participants** | [Names / Roles] |
| **Retrospective Format** | [e.g., Start/Stop/Continue, 4Ls, Mad Sad Glad] |

---

## What Went Well

> _Practices, behaviours, or outcomes the team wants to continue or amplify._

| # | What Went Well | Votes |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Description] | [#] |
| 2 | [Description] | [#] |

---

## What Could Be Improved

> _Pain points, inefficiencies, or things the team wants to change._

| # | Improvement Area | Votes |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Description] | [#] |
| 2 | [Description] | [#] |

---

## Action Items

> _Concrete, owned, time-bound actions. Each item should have one owner and a due date. Link to the tracking issue once created._

| # | Action Item | Owner | Due Date | Tracking Issue | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Description of action] | [Name] | YYYY-MM-DD | [#issue] | Open |
| 2 | [Description of action] | [Name] | YYYY-MM-DD | [#issue] | Open |

**Status values:** Open · In Progress · Complete · Deferred

---

## Review of Previous Action Items

> _Check in on actions from the previous retrospective._

| # | Previous Action Item | Owner | Was it completed? | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Action from last retro] | [Name] | ✅ Yes / ❌ No / ⚠️ Partial | [Notes] |
| 2 | [Action from last retro] | [Name] | ✅ Yes / ❌ No / ⚠️ Partial | [Notes] |

---

## Themes & Patterns

> _Note any recurring themes across multiple retrospectives. These may indicate systemic issues requiring a larger improvement initiative._

- [Theme 1 — e.g., "Testing bottleneck at sprint end" — appeared in 3 consecutive retros]
- [Theme 2]

---

## Follow-up

- All action items converted to backlog issues by: **YYYY-MM-DD**
- Next retrospective scheduled: **YYYY-MM-DD**
- Summary shared with stakeholders: ⬜ Yes / ⬜ No

---
